description: Contoso Retail needs a secure three-tier web application on Azure: browser clients, App Service API tier, Azure SQL for transactional data, Azure CDN for static assets, and Entra ID–backed authentication. Non-functional goals include private endpoints for data plane, encryption at rest, and cost visibility per environment.
constraints: Public HTTPS only at CDN edge; origin App Service not directly internet-exposed
Use managed identity for SQL and Key Vault access
Deploy to two regions with Front Door routing for DR drill readiness
requiredCapabilities: Horizontal scale for peak retail traffic
assumptions: Team ships weekly; architecture review must fit a two-week sprint
Existing CI/CD is GitHub Actions targeting Azure Container Registry
inlineRequirements: Support staged rollout (canary) without dual-write to legacy on-prem SQL

documents.name: contoso-retail-context.txt
documents.content: Fictional Contoso Retail sells outdoor goods online. Peak traffic follows seasonal campaigns.

topologyHints: Prefer stateless web tier behind Front Door
Cache product catalog reads at CDN edge
securityBaselineHints: OWASP ASVS L2 for public web
Secrets only in Key Vault; no connection strings in repo
